'''Diehards''' were burrowing, predatory insects native to [[Atraken/Legends|Atraken]].

==Biology and appearance==
Diehards had ten legs and a tough, chitinous shell. They had a dangerous set of mandibles, which they used to attack their prey. Diehards were very resistant to energy weapons such as [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. They were also immune to radiation, poison, and various viruses.

==Behavior==
They were non-sentient, and very aggressive. They attacked their prey in swarms and once attached, were difficult to detach.

==History==
Diehards were the only species to survive their homeworld's poisoning during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], earning them their name. They were also known to be the prey of the [[cidwen]].
